title: Pelagar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Pelagar''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pelagon]] in the [[Pelagia Province]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Pelagia Province was ruled by [[House Pelagia]].

{{City-stub}}
